---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for DTPF
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or use case this feature would solve. Who is affected (web app developers, end users, agent operators)?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Component

Which part of DTPF would this affect?

- [ ] Desktop agent (Tauri)
- [ ] `@dtpf/sdk-core`
- [ ] `@dtpf/sdk-react`
- [ ] Demo / examples
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Mockups, API sketches, links to similar projects, or platform-specific notes (Windows / Linux / macOS).
